descriptions.description: The 30ml Diva bottle features a flared base and feminine silhouette. Its 18-415 neck accepts fine mist sprayers for perfume and fragrance mist. A signature shape for luxury fragrance and beauty brands.
The 30ml Diva bottle features a flared base and feminine silhouette. Its 18-415 neck accepts fine mist sprayers. A signature shape for luxury fragrance and beauty brands.

A 46ml Diva bottle with an 18-415 neck for fine mist spray. This mid-size capacity bridges sample and full-size for perfume and eau de toilette. The flared base gives a stable, elegant stance on vanity and retail displays.
A 46ml Diva bottle with an 18-415 neck for fine mist spray. This mid-size capacity bridges sample and full-size for perfume and eau de toilette.

The 100ml Diva bottle with an 18-415 neck pairs with lotion pumps. Body lotion, hand cream, and face cream brands choose this shape for a premium, feminine aesthetic. A bestseller for skincare and fragrance lines.
